reliabilityChanges: GitHub, Calendar, and Email hydrate complete transcript content and restore a missing private summary before handoff.
Interrupted partial transcripts cannot authorize export.
Long email drafts fall back visibly to complete meeting share instead of silently truncating content.
GitHub request and response-body processing terminate after 30 seconds.
Startup, backup creation, and restore proactively persist missing summaries for completed transcripts.

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 cannot mount the developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build and fault-injection evidence does not prove locked 60/120-minute recording, physical native playback/import recovery, real saved-audio transcription, interruption recovery, or destination-app receipt of Markdown, PDF, Calendar, Email, or GitHub handoffs.
